title: Remove obsolete old-schema components and clean up dead code
description: After TASK-2 through TASK-6 are complete, the following components reference old tables (onboarding_requests, onboarding_types, onboarding_consent, documents) that no longer exist. They should be deleted and all references removed. Also remove debug console.log statements project-wide.
acceptanceCriteria: ExternalOnboardingTypesList.tsx is deleted (if it still queries old schema)
No file in src/ imports from the deleted components
No file in src/ queries 'onboarding_requests', 'onboarding_types', 'onboarding_consent', or 'documents' tables
No debug console.log statements remain in any src/ file (console.error and console.warn for actual errors are acceptable)
tsc reports no new type errors
npm run build completes without errors
Playwright: dashboard loads without errors after cleanup

steps.description: Grep for old table names to find all usages
steps.details: Run: grep -r 'onboarding_requests\|onboarding_types\|onboarding_consent\|.from.*documents' src/ --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' -l. List all files found.

Delete the following files if they still exist: src/components/dashboard/CreateOnboardingTypeDialog.tsx, src/components/dashboard/EditOnboardingTypeDialog.tsx, src/components/dashboard/DeleteOnboardingTypeDialog.tsx, src/components/dashboard/OnboardingTypesList.tsx. Check ExternalOnboardingTypesList.tsx — if it queries old tables, delete it too.

steps.description: Remove all imports of deleted components
steps.details: For each file that imported the deleted components (found via grep), remove the import statement and any JSX usage. If removing a component leaves a tab or section empty, either remove the tab or replace with a placeholder.
Run: grep -r 'console\.log' src/ --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' -l. For each file, remove all console.log calls. Keep console.error and console.warn where they handle real errors.

steps.description: Run tsc and npm run build
steps.details: Run npx tsc --noEmit. Then run npm run build. Fix any errors that arise from the deletions. Common issues: missing imports, unused variables left behind.

Start dev server (npm run dev). Navigate to /dashboard. Check browser console for errors. Take screenshot .agent/screenshots/TASK-13-dashboard-clean.png. Verify no console errors and dashboard renders.

technicalNotes: Do not delete OnboardingResponsesList.tsx — it was rewritten in TASK-6
Do not delete SendOnboardingRequestDialog.tsx — it was rewritten in TASK-2
Do not delete OnboardingForm.tsx — it was rewritten in TASK-4
After deletion, run 'npm run build' (not just tsc) to catch any dynamic imports or Next.js page references that tsc alone won't catch
